title: PRISM — Creative Studio
special: PAGE-TRANSITION: nav switches between full-screen views with a staggered multi-color curtain wipe (intro reveal on load + a wipe between every 'page'). Tap-driven, mobile-friendly. Reduced-motion → instant swap.
summary: Single-page portfolio that behaves like a multi-page site: clicking nav plays a staggered colored curtain transition between full-screen Home / Work / About / Contact views.
summary_vi: Portfolio một-trang nhưng cảm giác như nhiều trang: bấm menu phát hiệu ứng rèm màu wipe chuyển giữa các view Home / Work / About / Contact toàn màn hình.
